slot: AFTERNOON DECISION WINDOW (post immediately; Brewers/Cardinals first pitch 2:16 PM ET, pick already locked)
dayScript: Episode continues: Argentina cashed at noon (✅). The 2:10 Over post does double duty — decision-window receipt for the 4u total AND the Argentina grade in one line ('same board cashed the noon ML'). 3:15 Colombia countdown keeps the baton moving. ~5 PM Over grade post. Evening: Colombia grade + Graded card closes a potential 3-0 day.
loopReasoning: Ratchet: countdown/decision-window remains our best measured structure (1.8x OVER). This run's ONE variable: stacking a live win receipt ('same board cashed the noon ML') inside the countdown — proof + urgency in the same post instead of a separate grade post. Timing: 2:05-2:15 PM is inside our best measured window (noon-2 averages ~2.9K). Merging grade+countdown also preserves the 2-3h spacing rule that a separate 2:15 grade post would have violated with Colombia at 3:15.

verifiedNumbers.colombia: Colombia ML +130, 2.5u SHARP/WEAK, proven 4-2, 4:00 PM ET, locks 3:45 (board pull 2:03 PM — price moved from +125 to +130)

hero.text:
4 units cashed at noon. 4 more locked for 2:16.

Argentina ML ✅ — the easy part.

Now the same wallets are on Over 7.5, Brewers/Cardinals.

Nobody is watching this game. That's usually when they eat.

Graded here either way.
hero.screenshot: Argentina graded card + Over 7.5 pick card (both if possible, else Over card)

gradePosts.win:
Over 7.5 in Brewers–Cardinals. ✅

That's back-to-back 4-unit winners today — a noon ML everyone watched and a Tuesday total nobody did.

Colombia grades next. The board doesn't take days off.
gradePosts.loss:
Over 7.5 misses. ❌

4 units, graded in public, same as the noon winner. That's the deal.

Argentina ✅ + Colombia pending — the day's still green.

colombiaHero.text:
Colombia again...

Friday, they cashed the board's biggest play of the week.

Today, the same tracked wallets came back for more — at +130 this time.

2.5 units. Colombia ML. 4:00 PM ET.

Picks lock 15 minutes before kick. Soccer since June 1: 22-9, +25 units.
